# Model logos

Logos in this folder are shown next to each detected model in Settings. The repo includes **placeholder** SVGs (first letter in a circle); you can replace them with official logos from each provider’s brand or press page.

**Naming:** Use the logo filename that matches the model prefix. The app matches model names by prefix (e.g. `llama3.2` → `llama`, `codellama:7b` → `codellama`).

| Filename       | Model names (examples)   |
|----------------|--------------------------|
| codellama.svg  | codellama, codellama:7b  |
| deepseek.svg   | deepseek, deepseek-coder |
| gemma.svg      | gemma, gemma2            |
| llama.svg      | llama, llama3.2, llama3.1 |
| mixtral.svg    | mixtral                  |
| mistral.svg    | mistral, mistral-small   |
| phi.svg        | phi, phi3                |
| qwen.svg       | qwen, qwen2.5            |

Use **SVG** (or PNG) and replace the placeholder files with official logos from each provider’s brand or press page (e.g. Meta Llama, Mistral AI, Google Gemma).
